description.p: Passky is a simple and secure password manager for storing all of your passwords in one place.

With one master password, you can access your vault and manage your accounts without having to remember multiple complex passwords. Passky protects your data with strong encryption, helping keep your sensitive information safe and private.
Its clean and easy-to-use interface makes it simple to save, organize, search, and generate passwords across your devices.
Updated Electron
Updated Electron
Fixed design on login and register page on small screens
Updated Hungarian and Japanese
Updated Electron
Added debug mode and Hungarian language
Fixed password Imports
Improved password generator, password imports and design
Updated languages
Added password entropy, password hider, animations, license system, support for password deletion, icons in input fields and support for more languages
Changed AES to XChaCha20, SHA to Argon2id and requirements are now more permissive
Improved password search, language system, server picker, pagination, password generator, content security policy and dialog position
Updated languages, electron and tailwindcss
Added auto detect language and password refresh
Improved client authenticator
Updated languages, electron, service worker and jquery
Added Nord theme and an option to see how many passwords your account can store
Updated Polish, Swedish and French languages
Usernames now support underscore character
Website icons can now be toggled
Improved visual performance of toggling buttons
Added Monokai, Solarized Dark and Tokyo Night themes
Changed Light, Gray, Blue, Dracula and Dark themes
Added support for Firefox and Chromium password managers
Added Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish and Portuguese
Updated Simplified Chinese, Russian, French, German, Arabic, Swedish, Polish and Ukrainian
Updated Electron to v19.0.0
Added Indonesian, Korean and Ukrainian languages
Updated Hindi, Greek and Czech languages
Fixed broken position with really long website links or usernames
